# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: app-dev
---
apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webapp
  namespace: app-dev
  labels:
    app: webapp
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: webapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0
        name: webapp
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: app-dev
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  selector:
    app: memcached
---
apiVersion: apps/v1beta2
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: workers
  namespace: app-dev
  labels:
    app: workers
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: gcr.io/google-samples/node-hello:1.0
        name: worker
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-svc
  namespace: app-dev
  labels:
    app: memcached
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 11211
    targetPort: 11211
  selector:
    app: memcached
